about.label: About Us
about.title: A Creative Team Dedicated to Your Digital Growth
about.p1: Teridox was born from a deep passion for technology and the belief that every business deserves the best digital solutions. We build more than products — we build digital foundations that drive real growth.
about.p2: With a solid team and 3+ years of experience across diverse industries, we stand as your trusted partner in your digital transformation journey.
about.subtitle: We're a team of passionate developers and designers dedicated to building the best digital solutions

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Teridox was founded in 2020 by a group of developers frustrated by seeing many Indonesian businesses struggle to adopt the right technology. We believe good technology must be accessible, scalable, and truly solve real business problems. From a small team of 3, we've grown into a solid team that has served hundreds of clients across various industries.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: Accelerate the digital transformation of Indonesian businesses with high-quality, affordable, and sustainable technology solutions.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: To become the premier software house in Southeast Asia, known for innovation, quality, and positive impact on our clients.

items.desc: We are transparent, honest, and committed on every project.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and working process

items.q: How long does website development take?
items.a: Development time varies by complexity. A company profile website: 2–4 weeks. A web app with complex features: 2–4 months. We always provide a timeline estimate at the start of the project.

items.q: How much does mobile app development cost?
items.a: Cost depends on the platform (iOS/Android/both), features, and design complexity. Starting from IDR 30 million for simple apps up to hundreds of millions for enterprise apps. Contact us for a free estimate.

items.q: Does Teridox provide maintenance after the project is done?
items.a: Yes! We provide monthly maintenance packages that include security updates, bug fixes, server monitoring, and technical support. Packages start from IDR 1.5 million/month.
We use modern technologies: Next.js, React, TypeScript for frontend; Node.js, Python for backend; Flutter & React Native for mobile; AWS, Vercel, Supabase for cloud infrastructure.
Our process: (1) Consultation & discovery, (2) Proposal & contract, (3) Design & prototyping, (4) Agile sprint development, (5) Testing & QA, (6) Deployment, (7) Handover & training.

items.q: Can I request changes during the development process?
items.a: Absolutely! We use agile methodology with 2-week sprints, so feedback and changes can be integrated flexibly. Major changes outside the original scope may require an addendum.

items.q: Does Teridox serve clients outside Bali?
items.a: Yes! We serve clients from across Indonesia and internationally. Our workflow is fully remote-friendly with collaboration tools like Figma, Notion, and Slack.

items.q: What's the difference between a web app and a regular website?
items.a: A regular website is informational (company profile, blog). A web app has interactive features like login, dashboards, transactions, and data management. We build both to high performance standards.
